source_jobs.title: Financial Analyst
source_jobs.description:
American Tall is a thriving e-commerce brand, dedicated to producing world-class quality clothing for tall men, and women, up to 7’1. Founded by a father and son duo in 2015, the business has grown to a level that seemed almost unimaginable just a few years ago and is now a leading brand in the tall community. The growth can be attributed to the excellent leadership team and family values that drive the business –  respect, passion, support, and empowerment. 

We believe the best ideas come from a diverse group of people. This is a special opportunity to join an innovative business with tremendous upside, and a work culture built on the foundation of respect, inclusiveness, and continued learning.


We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Financial Analyst to support financial planning, operational finance, and accounting processes for our direct-to-consumer e-commerce business. This role will partner closely with teams across marketing, merchandising, and operations to provide financial insights while also supporting month-end close and vendor payment processes.
The ideal candidate combines strong analytical skills with a solid understanding of accounting fundamentals and e-commerce performance metrics.

source_jobs.title: Founding Ecommerce Lead – New Brand
source_jobs.description:
We are building a new direct-to-consumer apparel brand launching in Spring 2027. Backed by a team that's done it before, we're entering a category we believe has been overlooked for far too long. Customers deserve better products, a stronger brand, and a world-class experience. We’re here to raise the bar.  

This is an opportunity to join as one of our founding employees. You'll be part of a small team making key decisions, solving meaningful problems, and building the foundation of the business from pre-launch. The pace will be fast, the challenges real, and your impact impossible to miss. Every decision you make will help shape how this business grows. 

We're looking for builders. People who embrace uncertainty, move with urgency, take ownership, and are driven by the opportunity to create something exceptional. If you're excited by big challenges, meaningful responsibility, and the chance to help build a brand from the ground up, this could be a game-changing opportunity for you. 

The Role 

As our Ecommerce Lead, you'll support the day-to-day management and performance of our website, playing a key role in driving revenue growth and delivering an exceptional customer experience. 

This is a highly hands-on role for someone who enjoys both strategy and execution. One day, you might be reviewing sales performance, testing new Shopify apps, or optimizing the customer journey. The next, you could be writing product copy, troubleshooting a site issue, coordinating a product launch, or identifying new opportunities for growth.  

Working closely with leaders across product, creative, marketing, and technology, you'll turn ideas into execution while continually improving how customers discover, shop, and engage with our brand. You'll have meaningful ownership, broad exposure across the business, and significant influence over the future direction of the website experience.

source_jobs.title: Founding Head of Ecommerce – New Brand
source_jobs.description:
We are building a new direct-to-consumer apparel brand launching in Spring 2027. Backed by a team that's done it before, we're entering a category we believe has been overlooked for far too long. Customers deserve better products, a stronger brand, and a world-class experience. We’re here to raise the bar.  

This is an opportunity to join as one of our founding employees. You'll be part of a small team making key decisions, solving meaningful problems, and building the foundation of the business from pre-launch. The pace will be fast, the challenges real, and your impact impossible to miss. Every decision you make will help shape how this business grows. 

We're looking for builders. People who embrace uncertainty, move with urgency, take ownership, and are driven by the opportunity to create something exceptional. If you're excited by big challenges, meaningful responsibility, and the chance to help build a brand from the ground up, this could be a game-changing opportunity for you.  


The Role

As our founding Head of Ecommerce, you'll be responsible for defining how customers experience the website for our new Shopify brand, building the strategy, operating model, and roadmap that powers long-term digital growth. You'll be integral in establishing the vision for our ecommerce function, shaping the customer journey, identifying opportunities for commercial growth, and building the processes, governance, and technology needed to scale. From platform strategy and vendor partnerships to performance optimization and cross-functional alignment, you'll ensure site experience becomes one of the company's most important growth drivers. 

We're looking for someone who thrives in building from the ground up – someone equally comfortable thinking several years ahead while making smart, practical decisions that move the business forward today. As the ecommerce function grows, you'll play a key role in building and developing the team, fostering a culture of ownership, innovation, experimentation, and continuous improvement.

source_jobs.title: Marketing Project Manager
source_jobs.description:
American Tall is a thriving e-commerce brand, dedicated to producing world-class quality clothing for tall men, and women, up to 7’1. Founded by a father and son duo in 2015, the business has grown to a level that seemed almost unimaginable just a few years ago and is now a leading brand in the tall community. The growth can be attributed to the excellent leadership team and family values that drive the business –  respect, passion, support, and empowerment. 

We believe the best ideas come from a diverse group of people. This is a special opportunity to join an innovative business with tremendous upside, and a work culture built on the foundation of respect, inclusiveness, and continued learning.


 
We are seeking a highly organized Marketing Project Manager to drive the successful execution of campaigns, promotions, and cross-functional initiatives. This role is responsible for managing timelines from kickoff to delivery, ensuring all projects stay on track and aligned with our business goals. As the subject matter expert in Asana, our project management platform, you will coordinate closely with our Marketing, Creative, and eCommerce teams to streamline workflows, maintain visibility across projects, and proactively identify risks. Your ability to flag potential issues early and adjust plans accordingly will be critical to keeping projects moving efficiently and delivering high-quality results on time.  
 
This is a 20-month contract position, with potential to go longer.

notes: E-commerce brand with no tech roles posted
